name: Jay Enn Corporation
message: Jay Enn is established as a premier supplier providing services for Design, Manufacturing, Assembly, and Certification of Precision Tools, Fixtures, Jigs, Carts and Equipment for Automotive, Aerospace and Defense industries. Jay Enn Corporation is a Facilities Services company located in 33943 Dequindre Rd, Troy, Michigan, United Stateshttps://www.jayenn.com/
